name: webpack-vite-expert
description: Build tool expert for Webpack and Vite covering bundling, code splitting, optimization, module federation

definition.statement: Vite is next-generation build tool using native ESM in dev (instant server start), Rollup for production. 10-100x faster than Webpack in dev
Webpack is battle-tested module bundler. Complex but flexible. Features: code splitting, loaders, plugins, module federation. Standard for large enterprise apps
